task_completion.description: Verify that the agent successfully logged into Odoo.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo interface (e.g., Calendar app) is visible after logging in.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent located the 'Q2 Financial Review' meeting.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Q2 Financial Review' meeting is visible in the calendar, list view, or its details/edit screen is open.

task_completion.description: Verify that the start time of 'Q2 Financial Review' is updated to 9:30 AM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The start time field shows 9:30 AM (or 09:30) in the edit screen, or the meeting block in the calendar clearly starts at 9:30 AM.

task_completion.description: Verify that the location of 'Q2 Financial Review' is updated to 'Main Conference Room'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The location field shows 'Main Conference Room' in the edit screen or meeting details popup.

task_completion.description: Verify that the duration of 'Q2 Financial Review' is retained at 1 hour 30 minutes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The duration field shows 1.5 hours (or 1:30), the end time shows 11:00 AM, or the meeting block in the calendar spans exactly 1.5 hours (9:30 AM to 11:00 AM).

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the Odoo graphical user interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with the Odoo web interface in a browser, rather than using terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the actual Odoo application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the Odoo web application, not a text editor or mock interface.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not just type the expected answers in a text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The changes are made within the Odoo application's input fields or calendar view.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target event: 'Q2 Financial Review'. Reference event: 'Team Standup'. Target location: 'Main Conference Room'. Target duration: 90 minutes (1 hour 30 minutes). The 'Q2 Financial Review' must be rescheduled to start at 9:30 AM and end at 11:00 AM.
